description_long: This filing cabinet is a rectangular, box-like object with a light wood grain finish, giving it a clean and modern appearance. The cabinet features two long, horizontal panels on the top, which likely correspond to the tops of two drawers, separated by a subtle seam running down the center. The sides and front are smooth, with no visible handles, label holders, or locks, suggesting a minimalist design. The wood texture is consistent across all visible surfaces, with fine horizontal lines indicating a veneer or laminate finish. The overall form is solid and blocky, with sharp, well-defined edges and corners. Its size and proportions suggest it is designed to sit on the floor, suitable for storing files or documents in an office or similar environment.
description: A rectangular, wood-finished filing cabinet with two seamless drawers and a minimalist, handle-free design. The surface is smooth with a light wood grain texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the cabinet and the central seam dividing the two drawers.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the cabinet and the vertical seam between the drawers.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, with the same wood grain and central seam.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and vertical seam.
